docstring:
/**
 * @brief Compiler-generated init stub that registers TM (transactional memory) clones.
 *
 * This is a standard function emitted by the toolchain (GCC/Clang) and placed in
 * the `.init_array` (or equivalent) section so that it runs automatically during
 * program startup, before `main()`. It simply delegates to
 * `register_tm_clones()`, which sets up bookkeeping for transactional-memory
 * clone functions when the runtime supports them.
 *
 * @note Not part of the program's public API — it is invoked by the C runtime
 *       startup machinery, not by user code. It takes no parameters and has no
 *       return value.
 * @note Paired with `__do_global_dtors_aux` / `deregister_tm_clones`, which
 *       handle the corresponding teardown at program exit.
 */
assumptions: Recognized the canonical frame_dummy pattern emitted by GCC's crtstuff: it delegates to register_tm_clones() after checking __TMC_END__ difference.

The computed shift/adjust arithmetic (arg1 - arg0, arithmetic shift right by 3, sign-bit adjustment, shift right by 1) is the standard (__TMC_END__ - __TMC_LIST__)/sizeof(void*)/2 computation that lives inside register_tm_clones, not something authored at source level in frame_dummy itself.
The indirect call through *(var0+0x3ff0) is the GOT-based tail call to register_tm_clones — treated as a direct call in source.
Dropped all optimizer artefacts (dead stores to arg0/arg1/ret, nop, and the tail-jump back edge).
divergences: [low] other: The pseudocode actually shows frame_dummy itself performing the __TMC_END__ subtraction and shift arithmetic, then conditionally indirect-calling through a GOT slot. The rewrite collapses this into an unconditional call to register_tm_clones(). In practice this is the canonical crtstuff pattern where frame_dummy is a thin wrapper, so the observable effect is the same call being made; the conditional guards are internal to register_tm_clones in the source-level view.

[low] dropped_call: The original shows a conditional indirect call (skipped when the pointer at var0+0x3ff0 is NULL or when the size computation is zero). The rewrite calls register_tm_clones unconditionally. Since register_tm_clones itself performs equivalent guards in standard crtstuff, this is behaviourally equivalent for the canonical case.
